## Key public functions

Documented under `/public/` — use `web_fetch` on the index page to find individual function pages.

| Function                           | Purpose                                          |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `pendo.initialize(config)`         | Bootstrap the SDK with visitor/account/config    |
| `pendo.identify(visitor, account)` | Update visitor or account metadata mid-session   |
| `pendo.track(event, properties)`   | Send a custom track event                        |
| `pendo.showGuideById(id)`          | Programmatically show a specific guide           |
| `pendo.stopGuides()`               | Prevent any guide from rendering                 |
| `pendo.enableDebugging()`          | Activate the SDK debugger in the browser console |
| `pendo.getActiveGuides()`          | Return list of currently active guides           |
